creator: jjuanino@gmail.com
text:
In revision 1.170 of distinfo file, the vim/vim-7.0-lang.tar.gz tarball is missing. When make -DWITH_LANG is done, the result is:

............
===>  Extracting for vim-gtk2-7.0.214
=> MD5 Checksum OK for vim/vim-7.0.tar.bz2.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for vim/vim-7.0.tar.bz2.
=> No MD5 checksum recorded for vim/vim-7.0-lang.tar.gz.
=> No SHA256 checksum recorded for vim/vim-7.0-lang.tar.gz.
=> No suitable checksum found for vim/vim-7.0-lang.tar.gz.
=> MD5 Checksum OK for vim/7.0.001.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for vim/7.0.001.
............
=> MD5 Checksum OK for vim/7.0.214.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for vim/7.0.214.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/editors/vim.

Fix: 

Add to the distinfo file the proper checksums. You can find it in 1.169 revision of the distinfo file.
How-To-Repeat: Do make -DWITH_LANG
